issues.description: Trigger should be 'OnKO' (character removed from field), not 'Activated'. This is an automatic effect when a Straw Hat Crew character is removed by opponent effect.
Missing duration. Text states '[Opponent's Turn]' which requires duration:'DuringOpponentTurn', not permanent.
Missing condition to verify character type is {Straw Hat Crew} and removal is caused by opponent's effect.
Action should be 'AttachDon' (rest the DON), not just 'GiveDon'. The effect adds DON and rests it, requiring Rest action as well.
Missing Rest action. DSL should include both GiveDon and Rest to fully capture 'add up to 1 DON!! card and rest it'.
